_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the capabilities and functionality associated with various technologies for organizing and managing information (e.g., databases, bookmarking engines).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of metadata types (business, technical, operational, process) and the systems and methods used to collect, store, and maintain each type.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-011 (DQ, cosine: 0.621), AI-K-020 (AI, cosine: 0.620).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.561). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [associated, bookmarking, capabilities, databases, engines, functionality] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, collect, maintain, metadata, methods, operational] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.888 (P=0.887, R=0.889). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (96.0%). "Knowledge of the capabilities and functionality associated with various technolo" and "Knowledge of metadata types (business, technical, operational, process) and the" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.642 > STS 0.561 (gap +0.082). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.8%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [associated, bookmarking, capabilities, databases, engines, functionality]. WIDAI-only: [business, collect, maintain, metadata, methods, operational].
